task.name: Execution Mode Controller
task.objective: Control workflow execution behavior based on SYNC/ASYNC/Adaptive mode settings from configuration

llm.mandate: Execution mode MUST be resolved before any workflow step processing begins
ASYNC mode does NOT mean lower quality - it means different review cadence
Delegation context MUST be captured in ASYNC mode for audit trail

protocol.name: resolve_execution_mode
protocol.desc: Determine the active execution mode for this workflow run

step.title: Read Mode Configuration
step.action: Read execution_mode from core config (sync, async, or adaptive)
Read sync_quality_threshold and async_quality_threshold from bmm config

check.action: Evaluate task complexity based on: number of input documents loaded, number of workflow steps, whether template has 5+ sections
If high complexity (many inputs, many steps) → Set mode to 'sync'
If low complexity (few inputs, few steps) → Set mode to 'async'

step.title: Report Mode
step.action: Briefly inform user: "Executing in {{active_execution_mode}} mode (quality threshold: {{quality_threshold}})"

protocol.name: create_delegation_context
protocol.desc: Capture delegation context for ASYNC mode audit trail

step.title: Initialize Delegation File
step.action: Record: workflow name, execution mode, start time, inputs loaded, quality threshold

protocol.name: log_delegation_decision
protocol.desc: Record a decision point in the delegation context file

step.title: Append Decision
step.action: Append to delegation context: decision title, choice made, rationale, alternatives considered

protocol.name: generate_macro_review
protocol.desc: Generate consolidated review summary for ASYNC mode completion

step.title: Build Review Summary
step.action: Load the delegation context file for this workflow run
Summarize all decisions made during autonomous execution
List all artifacts produced with locations
Report quality gate results against async_quality_threshold

step.title: Present Macro-Review
step.action: Present the consolidated review to user
Highlight any decisions that were borderline or may need human review
Ask user to approve or request revisions to specific sections
